caption: In a medical simulation setting, two healthcare workers attend to a patient lying in a hospital bed. One worker wears a blue scrub top, a black face mask, and a stethoscope around her neck; she wears blue gloves and reaches toward the patient, who is covered by a white patterned blanket and has red curly hair. A second worker, partially visible, wears a black top and blue gloves. The room contains a light green chair and medical equipment. Across the sequence, the worker in blue maintains her position, continuing to interact with the patient. Each frame features a pink silhouette logo on the left accompanied by the text "Day 1" and a logo on the right with the text "Sim Week". The final frame of the sequence is entirely black, though the "Sim Week" logo remains visible in the bottom right corner.
